name: Sale History
query:
SELECT `tabSales Invoice`.customer, `tabSales Invoice Item`.`item_code` AS 'Item:Link/Item:200',
`tabSales Invoice`.posting_date,
`tabSales Invoice Item`.qty, `tabSales Invoice Item`.stock_uom, `tabSales Invoice Item`.rate
FROM `tabSales Invoice Item`
JOIN `tabSales Invoice` on `tabSales Invoice`.name = `tabSales Invoice Item`.parent
WHERE `tabSales Invoice`.customer = 'โรงเรียนวิทยาศาสตร์จุฬาภรณราชวิทยาลัย บุรีรัมย์'
and `tabSales Invoice`.docstatus = 1
order by `tabSales Invoice Item`.`item_code`, `tabSales Invoice`.posting_date, `tabSales Invoice Item`.qty,`tabSales Invoice Item`.rate
